name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Thread Creation False-Positives
notes: This Building Block defines processes allowed to create remote threads.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Thread Creation False-Positives on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches Start Function (custom) is any of [EtwpNotificationThread or CtrlRoutine]

when the event matches (Start Function = 'EtwpNotificationThread' and Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\system32\ntdll.dll') or (Start Function = 'CtrlRoutine' and Process Path ilike 'C:\Windows\System32\csrss.exe' and (Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\System32\KERNELBASE.dll' or Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\system32\kernel32.dll')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Remote Thread Creation False-Positives on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches Start Function (custom) is any of [EtwpNotificationThread or CtrlRoutine]

AND when the event matches (Start Function = 'EtwpNotificationThread' and Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\system32\ntdll.dll') or (Start Function = 'CtrlRoutine' and Process Path ilike 'C:\Windows\System32\csrss.exe' and (Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\System32\KERNELBASE.dll' or Start Module ilike 'C:\Windows\system32\kernel32.dll')) AQL filter query
